title: plantago lagopus subsp. cylindrica
intro: Plantago lagopus subsp. cylindrica, also known as the narrowleaf plantain or buckthorn plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that have been utilized for centuries, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds such as aucubin, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, salve, or tincture, and is also used as a poultice to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
